mnemonics.title: Array Index Reminder
mnemonics.content: FIVE: First Index is Very Easy - Arrays start at 0 in C++

mnemonics.title: Loop Types
mnemonics.content: WHILE before you DO: while checks condition first, do-while does at least once

mnemonics.title: Switch Remember
mnemonics.content: S-C-D-B: Switch expression, Case constant, Default optional, Break essential

mnemonics.title: For Loop Structure
mnemonics.content: I C U: Initialization, Condition, Update - the three parts of for loop

acronyms.usage: Remember loops iterate over data structures programmatically

acronyms.expansion: I-f F-alse E-lse L-ogic E-nables S-ingle E-xpression

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a row of mailboxes numbered 0,1,2,... each holding one value of same type, side by side in memory
Think of a clock: outer loop is hours, inner loop is minutes - for each hour, all minutes repeat
Think of a railway switchyard with multiple tracks; the expression value chooses which track to follow
While = Check before diving (may not dive); Do-While = Dive first, then check (always at least one dive)

analogies.analogy: Like building floor numbers - ground floor is floor 0, first floor is floor 1, etc.
Like hitting the emergency exit button in a building - immediately leaves the current structure
Like skipping a step in a recipe and moving to the next step of the same iteration
Like a revolving door that never stops turning unless someone pushes the stop button (break)
